title: CTET September Online Application Form 2026

detail.title: CTET September Online Application Form 2026
detail.short_info: CTET September Online Application Form 2026 starts from 11 May 2026. Check important dates, eligibility, application fee, how to apply and exam pattern for CTET September 2026.

content.text: CTET September Online Application Form 2026 has been announced by the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE). The online application process starts on 11 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 10 June 2026. Candidates can fill the CTET September 2026 form online at the official websites https://ctet.nic.in and https://www.cbse.gov.in for the 22nd Edition of the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (Paper I and Paper II) scheduled on 06 September 2026 (Sunday).

This comprehensive guide covers all essential details including important dates, eligibility criteria, application fee, step-by-step application process, exam pattern, syllabus highlights, and more to help aspiring teachers successfully apply and prepare for CTET September 2026.
CTET September Online Official Notification 2026: Click Here

The CBSE has released the public notice for CTET September 2026. The online application form is expected to be available from 11.05.2026. There is no provision to choose the examination city; it will be allotted randomly. No requests for city change will be accepted.
Apply Online: Click Here to Apply Online

rows: Last Date for Submission of Online Form

content.text: Note: Exam may also be held on 05 September 2026 (Saturday) if the number of candidates is high.
Paper I (Classes 1 to 5): Senior Secondary (or equivalent) with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in final year of 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (D.El.Ed/B.El.Ed) or equivalent.
Paper II (Classes 6 to 8): Graduation degree with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in final year of B.Ed or equivalent.
Age Limit: No age limit (as per CBSE rules).
Detailed eligibility will be available in the official Information Bulletin.
Payment Mode: Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking.

sections.heading: How to Apply for CTET September 2026

items: Visit the official website https://ctet.nic.in or https://www.cbse.gov.in.
Click on the “Apply Online” link for CTET September 2026.
Complete registration with basic details and generate login credentials.
Fill the online application form carefully with personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload scanned photograph and signature as per specifications.
Pay the required application fee online.
Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.

content.text: Correction Window: Limited corrections allowed from 15–18 June 2026 only.

rows: Child Development & Pedagogy, Language I & II, Mathematics, Environmental Studies
Child Development & Pedagogy, Language I & II, Mathematics/Science or Social Studies

content.text: Qualifying

rows: 55% (subject to change as per official bulletin)

content.text: The detailed syllabus will be provided in the Information Bulletin. It generally covers:
Download the official bulletin from ctet.nic.in for complete topic-wise syllabus.
